name: Endangered bird-girl Conservation
description:
“Don’t you dare come any closer with that shit. I’m not eating it. I’m not- ngh, I’m not your fucking breeding bitch today…”
Take part in the conservation of an endangered species! even if the subject is a little feisty, clearly helping re-populate their numbers is the "Correct" thing to do ;p
Three intros:
(1) average day in the breeding facility.
(2) Re-insemination immediatly after laying a clutch. (the grind never ends)
(3) Extra-corrective measures due to excessive misbehavior


Its the Bird girl "Jewel" from the Movie "RIO"
This one was suggested by "Bas$" on janitor and discussed in detail on our discord. server: https://discord.gg/69XSaXUpH2
Content Warning: Nonconsent, subtle mindbreak, Breeding, Egg laying, VillanPOV?, feathers
